incidents.title: Requests: Certificate Verification Bypass via Proxy
incidents.description: Requests library before 2.32.0 allows certificate verification to be silently disabled when a HTTPS proxy URL is provided, enabling MITM attacks on outbound HTTP calls.

proposed_rule.description: Detects use of the `requests` library at versions prior to 2.32.0 where certificate verification bypass via proxy is possible.
proposed_rule.developer_message: Upgrade `requests` to >= 2.32.0. Verify no code passes `verify=False` to requests.get/post calls — this can silently disable TLS verification.

incidents.title: Jinja2: HTML Attribute Injection via xmlattr Filter
incidents.description: Jinja2 before 3.1.3 is vulnerable to XSS via the `xmlattr` filter. A malicious value containing a newline character can inject arbitrary attributes into HTML tags when the filter is used.

proposed_rule.description: Detects use of Jinja2's `xmlattr` filter with user-controlled data, which can lead to XSS in versions < 3.1.3.
proposed_rule.developer_message: Upgrade Jinja2 to >= 3.1.3 and audit templates that pipe user input through the `xmlattr` filter. Sanitize all user-supplied values before rendering.

incidents.title: setuptools: Remote Code Execution via Package URL
incidents.description: setuptools before 70.0.0 allows remote code execution via a crafted package URL passed to the package_index module, exploitable during `pip install` or `setup.py` calls that fetch packages from custom indexes.

proposed_rule.description: Detects use of setuptools < 70.0.0 which is vulnerable to remote code execution via crafted package URLs.
proposed_rule.developer_message: Upgrade setuptools to >= 70.0.0. Avoid pointing pip at untrusted or user-supplied package index URLs.

incidents.title: Tornado: Open Redirect via StaticFileHandler
incidents.description: Tornado before 6.3.2 StaticFileHandler has an open redirect vulnerability. An attacker can craft a URL that causes a redirect to an arbitrary external domain.

proposed_rule.description: Detects use of Tornado's StaticFileHandler without version pinning to >= 6.3.2, leaving open-redirect vulnerability active.
proposed_rule.developer_message: Upgrade tornado to >= 6.3.2. If you use StaticFileHandler, ensure URL path inputs are validated and cannot be controlled by external users.

incidents.reject_reason: Tornado is not exposed to external users in our deployment.
